alias.empty_hint: Add an alias to quickly insert its value with a ;;(name) marker.
alias.usage_hint: Tap an alias to insert its ;;(name) marker — it expands to the value when sent to the agent, while the message keeps the marker. Tip: type ; in the composer to autocomplete. Agents can also create, edit, and search aliases via MCP.
alias.value_placeholder: The text this alias expands to

error.invalid_alias_name: Invalid alias name. Use letters, numbers, dot, underscore, or hyphen (max 20 characters).
error.alias_value_invalid: Invalid value. It must not be empty and can be at most 500 characters.
error.alias_unresolved_failclosed: This alias could not be resolved and was not sent.
error.alias_tags_invalid: Invalid tags. Use at most 10 tags, each up to 30 characters with no control characters.
error.list_unavailable: Aliases are still loading or failed to load. Please try again in a moment.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

machine.empty_hint: Enroll a controlled node to send it commands with a ^^(name) marker.
machine.usage_hint: Tap a machine to insert its ^^(name) marker. Type ^ in the composer to autocomplete. Offline machines can't be selected.

error.list_unavailable: Machines are still loading or failed to load. Please try again in a moment.
error.machine_unresolved_failclosed: This machine could not be resolved and was not sent.

usageSummary.title: Usage
usageSummary.error: Usage data could not be loaded.

roleHelp.viewer: Can view scoped state and join scoped discussion without driving the agent.
roleHelp.participant: Can view scoped state and send prompts to covered concrete tabs.

trust.title: Participant trust disclosure
trust.body: Agents are not sandboxed. UI/API limits reduce direct controls, but a participant prompt can still influence an agent acting in its accessible environment.

reason.share-role-denied: This role cannot use that action.
reason.share-direct-surface-denied: This surface is not available in shared access.
reason.share-rate-limited: Too many shared actions. Try again shortly.
reason.share-ticket-invalid: The shared access ticket is invalid.
reason.share-cancel-unsupported: Cancel is not supported for this shared tab.
reason.share-comment-invalid: The comment could not be posted.

appUpdate.banner_body: Refresh to use the latest version. Your sessions will stay available.
appUpdate.chunk_body: This page is running an older frontend and could not load a required app file. Refresh to recover cleanly.
appUpdate.blocking_body: {{feature}} needs the latest frontend after the server update. Refresh to continue without the panel getting stuck.

askQuestion.waiting: Waiting for your answer. The model continues on its own in {{seconds}}s.
askQuestion.retained: The model already continued. You can still interrupt it for {{seconds}}s.

chat.delete_message_confirm: Delete this message for everyone? This can't be undone.

timelineStatus.payloadTruncated: Timeline was shortened for faster loading
timelineStatus.detailMissing: Timeline detail is no longer available
timelineStatus.detailUnauthorized: Timeline detail is unavailable for this session

chat.sdk_agents_diagnostic_unsupported_runtim: Runtime does not expose agent status
chat.html_preview_too_large: HTML file is too large to render safely.
chat.tool_calls_toggle_undecided: Choose how to view AI activity
chat.memory_summary_sync_instruction: Context sync only. Digest these recent summaries as background context. Do not execute tasks, change files, call tools, or respond to this message; wait for the next user instruction.
chat.tool_chooser_subtitle: Tool calls, file changes, and reasoning add detail but can feel busy.
chat.tool_chooser_footnote: Change anytime via the wrench icon.
chat.external_link_warning: This link was generated by an AI agent. You are responsible for any risks associated with visiting external websites.
chat.zoom_hint: Long-press to select. Drag the handles to refine the selection, then use Copy.
chat.pinned_last_sent_aria: Jump to your last sent message
chat.memory_context_status_deduped_recently: {{count}} related memories found, but they were already injected recently
chat.memory_context_status_deduped_recently_d: Found {{count}} related memories. {{deduped}} were skipped because they were already injected in recent turns.
chat.memory_context_status_skipped_template_p: Skipped memory recall for an internal/template prompt
This message matches a built-in workflow or template prompt, so related-memory lookup was skipped on purpose.
chat.memory_context_status_skipped_short_prom: Skipped memory recall because the prompt is too short
Short prompts are not specific enough to produce reliable related-memory matches.
chat.memory_context_status_skipped_control_me: Skipped memory recall for a command message
Slash commands do not trigger related-memory lookup.
chat.memory_context_status_failed_detail: The message was still sent, but memory lookup failed this time.
chat.file_change_coarse_hint: File path available, but no diff text was provided.
chat.execution_clone_run: Run current task with execution clones
chat.execution_clone_run_with_template: Run current task with {{count}} clone(s) of {{name}}
chat.execution_clone_run_no_template: Enable and select an execution session in Team settings first

session.stop_main_body: {{project}} is a main session. Stopping it will terminate all its tmux processes. This cannot be undone.
session.confirm_stop_dialog: Are you sure you want to stop this session? This action cannot be undone.
session.confirm_restart_dialog: Are you sure you want to restart this session?
session.confirm_new_dialog: Are you sure you want to start a fresh session? Current session will be replaced.
session.label: Label
session.subsessionWorkingDirectoryLocked: Sub-sessions use the current directory and cannot change it during launch.
session.transport_send_queued: Queued — will send after the current reply finishes
session.send_placeholder_desktop_upload: {{placeholder}} Supports fast multi-file paste or drag upload

clone.title: Copy Session Group
clone.preserveDirectories: Default: cloned sessions use the original working directories
clone.overrideDirectories: Use a new working directory for cloned sessions
clone.gitRemoteUrlHelp: When filled, the daemon clones this remote into the replacement working directory before copying the group.
clone.gitRemoteCapabilityMissing: The connected daemon does not support cloning Git remotes for copied groups yet. Update or reconnect the daemon, then try again.
clone.daemonHostValidation: Working directories are validated on the daemon host before anything is created.
clone.runningWarning: The copied group starts fresh. Pending messages, terminal history, and running work from the source are not copied.
clone.capabilityMissing: The connected daemon has not reported session group copy support yet. Update or reconnect the daemon, then try again.
clone.notConnected: Connect to a server before copying a session group.
clone.daemonOffline: The daemon is offline. Reconnect it before copying a session group.
clone.missingServer: Select a server before copying a session group.
clone.cwdRequired: Enter a replacement working directory or preserve source directories.
clone.success: Copied group created as {{session}}. Switching to it now.
clone.cleanupRequiredBody: Some created resources may need manual cleanup. Review the daemon or server details before retrying.

errorCode.forbidden: Only owners and admins can copy session groups.
errorCode.unsupported_command: The daemon has not reported session group copy support. Update or reconnect it, then try again.
errorCode.source_not_found: The source session was not found.
errorCode.source_not_role_compatible: Only role-compatible main brain sessions can be copied.
errorCode.name_taken: That target session name is already in use.
errorCode.invalid_cwd: The working directory could not be used on the daemon host.
errorCode.invalid_git_remote: The Git remote URL is not supported.
errorCode.git_clone_failed: The daemon could not clone the Git remote into the working directory.
errorCode.incomplete_clone_spec: A running child session is missing copyable launch settings.
errorCode.unsupported_session_type: One of the sessions cannot be copied yet.
errorCode.p2p_config_invalid: The Team configuration could not be copied.
errorCode.persist_failed: The copy could not be saved.
errorCode.idempotency_conflict: This retry key was already used for a different copy request.
errorCode.server_commit_failed: The server could not commit the copied sessions.
errorCode.server_p2p_commit_failed: The server could not copy the Team settings.
errorCode.cleanup_required: The copy needs manual cleanup before retrying.

warningCode.p2p_prompt_session_reference: Free-text Team reference may still mention the source
warningCode.p2p_skipped_participant_dropped: Skipped Team participant was removed from the copy
warningCode.p2p_config_missing: No Team config was found to copy

session.openclaw_connect_hint: OpenClaw gateway is not connected. Run the following command on your daemon machine to connect:
session.weekly_quota_authorize_hint: Authorize reading your local Claude token to show the weekly (7-day) limit
session.weekly_quota_confirm: This reads your local Claude login token to fetch the weekly (7-day) limit. Authorize?

supervision.title: Session supervision
supervision.help: Set global defaults for new Auto-enabled sessions, then override them for this session when needed.
supervision.globalDefaultsHelp: Used to prefill new Auto-enabled transport sessions. Saving here updates your default supervisor backend, model, and timeout.
supervision.sessionConfigHelp: Applies only to the current session. Backend/model/timeout, peer auditor, loop limit, and custom instructions stay session-specific.

intro.title: What Auto does
intro.howToUseBody: Choose Off, Supervised, or Supervised + audit. For audit, select an eligible peer session running a different model and set the rework-loop limit.
intro.purposeBody: Auto lets a supervisor decide whether work is complete, should continue, or needs a human. Audit adds one lightweight review by the selected peer session.
intro.howItWorksBody: When the session reaches idle, IM.codes asks the supervisor for a structured decision. In Supervised + audit, a bounded brief for the completed turn is sent directly to the selected peer and its structured reply drives PASS or bounded rework.

supervision.customInstructionsPlaceholder: Example: Require tests and verification before marking the task complete.
supervision.customInstructionsHelp: Optional. These instructions are appended to Auto's supervision and continue prompts for this session only.
supervision.globalCustomInstructionsPlaceholder: Example: Always prefer tests over commenting-out failing code.
supervision.globalCustomInstructionsHelp: Optional. Applies to every Auto-enabled session unless that session overrides it below.
supervision.customInstructionsOverrideHelp: When checked, only this session's instructions above are used. When unchecked, the global value is prepended with a blank line.
supervision.customInstructionsMergedPreviewHeading: Merged instructions sent to the supervisor:
supervision.presetHelp: Routes the supervisor through a preset endpoint with its own base URL, API key, and pinned model. Manage presets in the Shared Context panel.
supervision.maxAutoContinueStreakHelp: Stops Auto after this many consecutive continue decisions of the same type. 0 = unlimited.
supervision.maxAutoContinueTotalHelp: Absolute cap on all auto-continue dispatches for one task run. 0 = unlimited.
supervision.disabledHint: Supervision is only available for transport sessions.
supervision.unsupported: Supervision settings are not available for process sessions.

validation.modelRequired: Select or enter a supervision model.
validation.auditTargetRequired: Select and confirm an eligible peer auditor.

supervision.invalidStoredConfig: Stored supervision config is invalid. Automation is disabled until you repair and save it.

execution.genericPrompt: Please carry out the requested implementation/execution work in this session.

server.upgrade_sent: Upgrade command sent to "{{name}}". The daemon will install the latest version and restart.
server.upgrade_failed: Failed to send upgrade command. The daemon may be offline.
server.delete_warning: This will remove all bindings and session records from the server, and notify the daemon to stop and delete local credentials.
server.delete_tmux_note: tmux sessions will not be closed
server.delete_tmux_suffix: , but the daemon will no longer auto-start.
server.delete_confirm_prompt: Type the server name to confirm deletion:

file_browser.preview_video_unsupported: Your browser cannot play this video format.
file_browser.preview_audio_unsupported: Your browser cannot play this audio format.

toast.upgrade_blocked_p2p_active: Team is still running. Stop it before upgrading the daemon.
toast.upgrade_blocked_auto_deliver_active: Auto Deliver is still running. Stop it before upgrading the daemon.
toast.upgrade_blocked_master_compaction_active: Memory master-summary compaction is still running. The daemon will upgrade after it finishes.
toast.upgrade_blocked_compression_active: Memory compression is still running. The daemon will upgrade after it finishes.
toast.upgrade_blocked_transport_busy: A transport session is still in a turn. Wait until it goes idle before upgrading the daemon.
toast.upgrade_blocked_session_busy: A session still has active work. Wait until it goes idle before upgrading the daemon.
toast.upgrade_blocked_cooldown_active: The daemon was upgraded recently. Automatic upgrade will retry after the cooldown.
toast.upgrade_blocked_toolchain_unavailable: Node is missing on the daemon host (toolchain removed). Reinstall Node — auto-upgrade is disabled until then.
toast.upgrade_blocked_unknown: The daemon is temporarily busy. Automatic upgrade will retry.

new_session.git_remote_capability_missing: The connected daemon does not support cloning Git remotes yet. Update or reconnect the daemon, then try again.

new_session.agent_flavor_sdk: SDK: supports streaming and uses a simpler UI.

voice.mic_permission_failed: Failed to start — check microphone/speech permissions in Settings

p2p.final_original_request_reminder:
After synthesizing the discussion, directly address and fulfill the user's original request instead of stopping at a discussion summary.
The original user request is: "{{request}}"
p2p.post_summary_execute_prompt:
The Team discussion is complete. Use the discussion file as context, then directly fulfill the user's original request in this session.
Discussion file: {{discussionFile}}
The original user request is: "{{request}}"
Do not stop at another discussion summary.

discussions.title: Discussions
discussions.empty: No Team discussions yet. Use @@all(discuss) or @agent to start one.

dropdown.solo_hint: Select a flow below to start a workflow
dropdown.team_intro_body: Agents discuss, summarize, implement, then review the result. Extra rounds repeat the loop to harden the outcome.
dropdown.team_intro_tooltip: Discussion → summary → implementation → review. More rounds repeat the loop on the previous result.
dropdown.workflows_empty: No saved workflows yet. Open Settings → Advanced Workflow to design one.

p2p.settings_process_body: Team mode runs a discussion-summary-implementation-review loop. One round completes the loop once; additional rounds use the previous implementation result as context for another audit/review pass so agents can catch missed requirements, regression risks, edge cases, and test gaps before the work is considered done.
p2p.alpha_hint: Experimental capability; not formally validated yet.

tab.advanced_workflow_intro: Design a directed Team workflow. Nodes are agent rounds (LLM, script, or logic gates); edges control routing. Edits here override the simple round/mode pipeline configured under Agents.
tab.advanced_workflow_alpha_notice: Experimental capability; not formally validated yet. Prefer preset combos for critical work.
tab.advanced_workflow_empty_hint: Initializing a blank workflow draft. Add nodes and edges in the canvas below to design your Team pipeline.

p2p.combo_send_confirm_body: This message will be sent directly with the combo flow {{mode}}. Continue?
p2p.combo_send_confirm_skip: Don't ask again, send directly next time
p2p.combo_empty_message_warning: Combo send requires a real message. Add some prompt text before sending.
p2p.combo_requires_participants_hint: Choose Team participants in Settings to enable combo modes.
p2p.member_cannot_initiate_discussion: This session is a Team member, so it can't start a discussion. Start it from another session — a top-tier model is recommended.
p2p.settings_default_hint: New sessions default to: enabled + audit
p2p.settings_rounds_explanation: Each round is a complete multi-agent analysis loop: discuss the request, execute it, then run another composite audit/review cycle to catch omissions, regression risks, and edge cases before further hardening.
p2p.settings_hop_timeout_hint: How long to wait for each agent to respond. Increase for complex tasks.
p2p.settings_extra_prompt_hint: Additional instructions for all participants (e.g. "Reply in Chinese")

single_agent_prompt.title: Add more agents?
single_agent_prompt.tip_multi: Using multiple agents from different types/providers helps break fixed thinking patterns and usually gives the best results.
single_agent_prompt.tip_rounds: For Team discussions, 2 rounds usually work best.
single_agent_prompt.dont_show_again: Don't remind me again for this account
single_agent_prompt.tip_history: Multi-agent discussions share files and keep fuller history. One-to-one discussions are treated as one-off discussions.

p2p.settings_workflow_migration_body: This saved advanced config uses the old rounds format. Save to create a workflow launch envelope before launching advanced Team.
p2p.settings_workflow_migration_ready: A workflow launch envelope is ready for advanced Team launches.
p2p.settings_workflow_migration_error: Advanced workflow migration failed. Review the saved rounds before launching.

diagnostics.forbidden_envelope_field: The launch envelope contains a forbidden private field.
diagnostics.unsupported_schema_version: This workflow schema version is not supported.
diagnostics.unknown_future_schema_read_only: This future workflow version is read-only here.
diagnostics.mixed_advanced_schema_fields: Old and new advanced workflow fields are mixed.
diagnostics.static_policy_mismatch_recompiled: Daemon policy changed, so the workflow was recompiled.
diagnostics.missing_required_capability: The daemon is missing a required workflow capability.
diagnostics.capability_stale: Lost contact with the daemon — saved configs still work, but new advanced workflow launches are paused until the daemon reconnects (usually <30s).
diagnostics.capability_downgraded_during_run: A required capability was downgraded during the run.
diagnostics.invalid_launch_envelope: The workflow launch envelope is invalid.
diagnostics.invalid_routing_authority: The workflow routing authority is invalid.
diagnostics.invalid_edge_condition: A workflow edge condition is invalid.
diagnostics.loop_budget_exhausted: The workflow loop budget was exhausted.
diagnostics.invalid_prompt_append: A workflow prompt append is invalid.
diagnostics.missing_context_source: A required workflow context source is missing.
diagnostics.context_source_too_large: A workflow context source is too large.
diagnostics.unsafe_artifact_path: A workflow artifact path is unsafe.
diagnostics.artifact_identity_collision_resolved: An artifact identity collision was resolved.
diagnostics.artifact_baseline_too_large: An artifact baseline is too large.
diagnostics.artifact_baseline_mismatch: An artifact baseline did not match.
diagnostics.artifact_contract_not_satisfied: An artifact contract was not satisfied.
diagnostics.invalid_script_contract: A workflow script contract is invalid.
diagnostics.script_executable_denied: The script executable is not allowed.
diagnostics.daemon_busy: The daemon is busy with other advanced workflows.
diagnostics.workflow_stale_after_restart: The workflow became stale after daemon restart.
diagnostics.private_projection_field_dropped: A private projection field was dropped.
diagnostics.legacy_progress_snapshot_sanitized: A legacy progress snapshot was sanitized.
diagnostics.unknown_p2p_message: An unknown Team workflow message was ignored.
diagnostics.unmatched_edge_route: No outgoing conditional edge matched the route and no default edge exists.

editor.title: Advanced workflow draft
editor.normalize_banner_one: {{count}} legacy node needs preset/scope alignment for logic/script. Click Apply to fix.
editor.normalize_banner_other: {{count}} legacy nodes need preset/scope alignment for logic/script. Click Apply to fix.
editor.normalize_banner: {{count}} legacy node(s) need preset/scope alignment for logic/script. Click Apply to fix.
editor.read_only_notice: This workflow uses a future schema and is read-only here.
editor.canvas_hint: Drag nodes to position. Drag from the right anchor (●) to another node to create an edge. Mouse wheel or pinch to zoom.
editor.inspector_empty: Select a node or edge to edit its properties.

node.summary_prompt_label: Round summary prompt (auto-runs after this node)
node.script_argv_label: Script command (one argv entry per line; first line is the executable)

allowed_executables.title: Allowed script executables
allowed_executables.hint: Hard-enforced at script spawn time. Add absolute paths (e.g. /usr/bin/jq) or PATH-relative names that script nodes are permitted to invoke. LLM-only workflows do not need any entries here.
allowed_executables.empty: No executables allowed yet. Script nodes in this workflow will be rejected at bind time until you add at least one entry.

library.title: Workflow library
library.hint: Saved workflows for this session. The active one is sent to Team launches. Up to {{max}} entries.
library.delete_confirm: Delete workflow "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.

openspec.title: OpenSpec
openspec.load_timeout: OpenSpec changes took too long to load. Try again after the daemon reconnects.
openspec.load_unavailable: OpenSpec changes are unavailable until the daemon connection is ready.

execute.no_change: Open a change to choose its execution target.
execute.no_sessions: No eligible execution sessions in this project yet.

auto.list_empty: No Auto Deliver runs observed yet.
auto.confirm_stop: Stop this Auto Deliver run? Active Team/audit work will be cancelled.
auto.conflict_active: Auto Deliver is already running for {{change}}.
auto.redacted_conflict: Another session in this group is running Auto Deliver.
auto.conflict_summary: Details are visible only in participating sessions.
auto.lock_manual_actions: Auto Deliver is running for this session group.
auto.scores_pending_repair_rescore: These scores are from the previous implementation audit. Auto Deliver is repairing those findings now and will rescore after implementation finishes.
auto.audit_results_empty: No audit rounds have completed yet

error.active_run: Auto Deliver is already running for this session group.
error.manual_team_busy: A manual Team run is already using this session group.
error.unsupported_runtime: Auto Deliver requires a transport-backed coding session.
error.invalid_rounds: Round counts are outside the allowed range.
error.daemon_offline: Daemon is offline. Try again after it reconnects.
error.launch_timeout: Auto Deliver launch timed out. Try again.
error.stop_timeout: Auto Deliver stop timed out. Try again.
error.custom_combo_unsupported: Custom Team combos are not supported for Auto Deliver yet.
error.combo_unsupported: This Team combo is invalid or unsupported.
error.strict_result_failed: The audit did not return a valid strict result.
error.continue_timeout: Auto Deliver continue timed out. Try again.

ask.needs_human_question: Auto Deliver needs human input: {{reason}} What should happen next in this session?
ask.review_continue: Review the failure and continue manually
ask.review_continue_desc: Send an instruction to inspect the stopped run, fix the issue, and report back.
ask.stop_summarize: Stop here and summarize the current state
ask.stop_summarize_desc: Ask the agent to stop active work and provide a concise handoff.

reason.auto_deliver_active: Auto Deliver is already running for this session.
reason.audit_p2p_failed: The Team/P2P audit run failed before producing a result.
reason.missing_authoritative_json: The audit did not produce a final authoritative JSON result.
reason.invalid_authoritative_json: The final authoritative JSON result is invalid.
reason.audit_metadata_mismatch: The audit result metadata does not match this Auto Deliver run.
reason.invalid_authoritative_result_path: The authoritative result file path is outside the allowed discussion directory.
reason.invalid_audit_verdict: The audit verdict payload is invalid.
reason.audit_blocked: The audit reported a blocked result. Review the scores and decide whether to run Auto Deliver again.
reason.tasks_missing_checkboxes: tasks.md has no task checkboxes to verify.
reason.implementation_audit_required: Implementation audit is required before completion.
reason.implementation_prompt_limit_reached: The implementation prompt limit was reached.
reason.max_elapsed_time_reached: The Auto Deliver time limit was reached.
reason.out_of_band_target_session_input: Manual input was sent to the implementation session during Auto Deliver.
reason.spec_audit_rework_reported: Spec audit reported follow-up work. Review the scores and decide whether to run Auto Deliver again.
reason.implementation_audit_rework_reported: Implementation audit reported follow-up work. Review the scores and decide whether to run Auto Deliver again.
reason.audit_pass_with_unchecked_tasks: The audit passed while tasks.md still has unchecked tasks.
reason.audit_pass_with_required_changes: The audit passed while required changes remain.
reason.audit_pass_without_scores: The audit passed without complete module scores.
reason.audit_pass_with_changed_files_without_re: The audit passed after file changes without repair summaries.
reason.audit_pass_with_uncovered_changes: The audit repair summary does not cover all changed files.
reason.quality_gate_low_score: A quality gate paused for low module score: {{modules}}. Auto Deliver will run an implementation repair prompt, then audit and score again.
reason.final_audit_rework_scored: Final audit completed with follow-up work scored. Review the module scores to decide whether to run Auto Deliver again.
reason.final_audit_blocked_scored: Final audit completed with a blocked verdict scored. Review the module scores to decide whether to run Auto Deliver again.
reason.auto_commit_push_git_status_failed: Auto commit/push could not read git status: {{detail}}
reason.auto_commit_push_preexisting_changes: Auto commit/push skipped because product files were already dirty before launch: {{files}}
reason.auto_commit_push_incomplete: Auto commit/push needs human review because product files are still dirty after the commit/push step: {{files}}
reason.auto_commit_push_no_upstream: Auto commit/push needs human review because this branch has no upstream.
reason.auto_commit_push_not_pushed: Auto commit/push needs human review because {{count}} commit(s) are still ahead of upstream.
reason.auto_commit_push_no_commit: Auto commit/push needs human review because no new commit was created.
reason.auto_commit_push_forbidden_paths: Auto commit/push needs human review because local planning files were committed: {{files}}
reason.auto_commit_push_unexpected_files: Auto commit/push needs human review because the commit included files outside the current Auto Deliver change: {{files}}
reason.spec_audit_blocked: Spec audit is blocked. Review the result, fix the issue, then continue.
reason.implementation_audit_blocked: Implementation audit is blocked. Review the result, fix the issue, then continue.
reason.spec_audit_rework_requires_repair: Spec audit reported required repairs. Auto Deliver will continue with the next audit-repair cycle.
reason.implementation_audit_rework_requires_rep: Implementation audit reported required repairs. Auto Deliver will run implementation repair, then audit and score again.
reason.spec_audit_followup_repair: Spec audit discussion completed. Auto Deliver will repair the artifacts before final acceptance scoring.
reason.implementation_audit_followup_repair: Implementation audit discussion completed. Auto Deliver will run a final repair pass before acceptance scoring.

lifecycle.spec_repair_prompt_dispatched: Spec repair prompt sent from audit findings: {{reason}}
lifecycle.implementation_repair_prompt_dispatched: Implementation repair prompt sent from audit findings: {{reason}}
lifecycle.implementation_idle_incomplete: Implementation is still working through tasks.
lifecycle.post_repair_result_file_repair_prompt_di: Final acceptance result-file repair prompt sent.
lifecycle.spec_audit_rework_scored: Spec audit completed with follow-up work scored.
lifecycle.spec_audit_blocked_scored: Spec audit completed with a blocked verdict scored.

auto.auto_commit_push: Commit and push automatically after audit passes
auto.auto_commit_push_help: Saved as your preference. After the audit passes, the agent receives commit&push.

openspec.audit_implementation_prompt: Perform a strict implementation audit for {{reference}} against its OpenSpec artifacts. Identify every mismatch, omission, regression risk, edge-case gap, and missing test; then fix the code, tests, and any required supporting changes. If the change artifacts need to move with the implementation, update the relevant OpenSpec files under {{reference}} in the same task. Do not stop at a report. Deliver the implementation in full spec compliance.
openspec.audit_spec_prompt: Perform a strict specification audit for {{reference}}. Strengthen scope, requirements, acceptance criteria, edge cases, failure modes, dependencies, and testability; remove ambiguity and internal inconsistency; then directly update the change artifacts under {{reference}} (proposal, design, specs, tasks) until they are implementation-ready. Do not stop at review notes.
openspec.implement_prompt: Drive the implementation of {{reference}} aggressively. Break the work into concrete sub-tasks, dispatch sub-agents with clear ownership, integrate their output, resolve gaps against the spec, add or update tests, and verify the finished result. Keep the OpenSpec artifacts under {{reference}} aligned with the implementation as you go instead of leaving follow-up notes. You own orchestration, technical decisions, and final acceptance.
openspec.achieve_prompt: Take {{reference}} to done using the full OpenSpec workflow. Inspect all remaining tasks and artifacts, complete the required implementation and spec work, directly update proposal/design/specs/tasks under {{reference}} where needed, close outstanding gaps, sync affected specs if needed, and archive the change once it meets completion criteria. Do not stop at status reporting.
openspec.propose_from_discussion_prompt: Generate an OpenSpec change from the recent discussion. Extract the goal, scope, key requirements, and acceptance criteria, list unclear points as follow-ups, and write the actual change artifacts under openspec/changes/ (proposal, design, specs, tasks) instead of stopping at a draft note.
openspec.propose_from_description_prompt: Generate an OpenSpec change from the description below. Organize the goal, scope, key requirements, and acceptance criteria, list missing details as follow-ups, and write the actual change artifacts under openspec/changes/ (proposal, design, specs, tasks) instead of stopping at a draft note.

upload.long_text_requires_attachment: Paste is too large for inline input here. Upload it as a file instead.
upload.drop_overlay_hint: Release anywhere in this session window

settings.title: Settings
settings.team_discussion_title: Use multiple agents for complex work
settings.team_discussion_body: Team discussion is not just for code. It also works well for complex documents, proposals, audits, and decisions. Different models challenge and complement each other, producing more rigorous results.
settings.team_discussion_point_1: Write the topic in the input box first, then choose a discussion mode to start.
settings.team_discussion_point_2: For difficult work, add rounds so the previous conclusion is reviewed and hardened.
settings.team_discussion_point_3: OpenSpec audits, complex proposals, code reviews, and architecture decisions are good fits for finding single-model blind spots.
settings.password_error: Failed to change password. Check your current password.
settings.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.password_missing_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
settings.password_missing_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
settings.password_missing_digit: Password must contain at least one number
settings.username_invalid: Use 3-32 chars: lowercase letters, numbers, dot, underscore, hyphen
settings.set_password_hint: Passkey accounts do not have a username or password by default. Verify your passkey once, then set both so you can also sign in with a password.
settings.password_setup_error: Failed to set password login. Verify your passkey and try again.
settings.passkey_verify_browser_only: Passkey verification for password setup is currently only available in the web browser.
settings.passkey_verify_wrong_account: That passkey belongs to a different account. Verify with the passkey registered to this account.
settings.passkey_verify_no_passkeys: No passkeys are registered for this account.

executionRouting.title: Execution routing
executionRouting.enableHint: When enabled, implementation/execution work is dispatched to short-lived clone workers copied from the template session below, instead of running in the orchestrator. Saving this only stores the preference; it does not start any execution.
executionRouting.templateHint: Clones inherit this session’s provider, model, and tooling but never its identity or history. Only eligible non-main sessions in this project are listed.
executionRouting.noCandidates: No eligible template sessions in this project yet. Start a worker or sub-session to use as a template.
executionRouting.reselectRequired: Routing is enabled but no valid template is selected for this project. Pick an execution template session below.

ineligibleReason.cron_clone_forbidden: scheduled session cannot be a template

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.require_approval_disabled: Enable registration first to configure approval
admin.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete user "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
admin.confirm_disable_msg: Are you sure you want to disable user "{{name}}"? They will no longer be able to log in.

repo.title: Repository
repo.error_cli_missing_hint: Install the GitHub CLI to use repo features:
repo.error_rate_limited: API rate limit reached. Try again later.
repo.more_files: More files — view full list on GitHub
repo.body_truncated: Content truncated — view full on GitHub
repo.checkout_remote_only_disabled: Remote-only branches cannot be switched in this version.
repo.checkout_dirty_worktree: Clean or commit local changes before switching branches.
repo.checkout_git_operation_in_progress: Finish the current git operation before switching branches.
repo.checkout_invalid_target: Only existing local branches can be switched.
repo.checkout_in_progress: A branch switch is already in progress for this repository.
repo.checkout_busy: Repository operations are busy. Try again shortly.
repo.checkout_branch_in_use: That branch cannot be switched right now.
repo.checkout_detached_head: Checkout is blocked while HEAD is detached.
repo.checkout_not_a_git_repo: This project is not a git repository.
repo.local_commit_fallback_error: Failed to load local git history.

localWebPreview.title: Local Web Preview
localWebPreview.sandboxNote: The preview runs in a sandboxed iframe. Some apps may work better in a new tab.
localWebPreview.empty: Enter a localhost port and path, then open the preview.
localWebPreview.initialPathNote: Path sets only the initial page. After load, navigation is scoped by port, not by this path.

cron.title: Scheduled Tasks
cron.name: Task Name
cron.advanced_help: Format: minute hour day month weekday — e.g., 0 9 * * 1-5 = weekdays at 9am
cron.send_target_placeholder: Exact session name, label, or agent type
cron.shell_hint: Tip: Shell sessions can run scripts directly — just enter the script path (e.g. /path/to/script.sh)
cron.read_only_scope: This cron job belongs to another server or tab and is temporarily read-only here.

fileBrowser.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
fileBrowser.fileTooLarge: File too large to save (> 5 MB)
fileBrowser.saveTimeout: Save timed out — please reload file

prompt.title: Enable the new-user guide?
prompt.body_1: Your first main session is ready. If you are new, this short guide will walk you through the core controls.
prompt.body_2: It starts with the basic buttons, then ends with how multi-agent discussions work best.

team_discussion_guide.title: Team discussion mode lives here
team_discussion_guide.body_1: Discussion mode is not just for code; use it for complex documents, proposals, OpenSpec audits, code reviews, and architecture decisions.
team_discussion_guide.body_2: Different models challenge and complement each other, often producing more rigorous results than a single model alone.
team_discussion_guide.body_3: Enter what you want discussed, choose a discussion mode, then start. For hard problems, add rounds to harden the conclusion.

new_main.title: Create a main session here
new_main.body_1: Use this button to create a new main session for a project.
new_main.body_2: Main sessions are the entry point for terminal, chat, repo, and discussion workflows.

new_sub.title: Create a sub-session here
new_sub.body_1: Use this button to add a worker or helper sub-session under the current project.
new_sub.body_2: Sub-sessions are useful for side tasks, reviews, experiments, and parallel work.

discussions.title: Open discussion history here
discussions.body_1: This opens your discussion history so you can review previous discussion runs and results.

repo.title: Open the repository panel here
repo.body_1: Use this button to inspect repository status, branches, commits, PRs, and CI.

cron.title: Open scheduled tasks here
cron.body_1: Use this button to create and manage scheduled tasks for the current project.

view_toggle.title: Switch between chat and terminal here
view_toggle.body_1: Use this toggle to switch between chat view and live terminal view for the current session.

p2p_defaults.title: Configure default discussion participants here
p2p_defaults.body_1: Open this menu and choose Config when you want to set which sessions join @all by default.
p2p_defaults.body_2: That is also where you quickly choose default discussion rounds.

p2p_send.title: Start discussions from the input box
p2p_send.body_1: Type @@all(discuss), @@all(review), or another mode to start a shared discussion quickly.
p2p_send.body_2: Agent discussions work best with 2 or more agents from different providers or types. That helps break fixed thinking patterns and usually gives better results.
p2p_send.body_3: Multi-agent discussions share files and preserve fuller history. One-to-one discussions are treated more like one-off discussions. In practice, 2 rounds are a strong default.

management.title: Shared Context
management.heroDescription: Manage shared enterprises, enrolled projects, authored knowledge, and processing behavior from one place.
management.inviteDescription: Invite people into the enterprise as members. Promote them to admin later from the Members tab if needed.
management.memberRolesDescription: Owners can promote admins. Admins manage projects and knowledge but cannot appoint other admins.
management.workspaceDescription: Use workspaces to group shared projects. They are optional and do not change ownership.
management.enrollDescription: Enroll a canonical repository to make its processed context and authored knowledge shareable in this enterprise.
management.policyDescription: Set the runtime guardrails for a shared project. These affect how shared context is allowed to flow into live sends.
management.knowledgeDescription: Author coding standards, architecture guidance, and reusable knowledge as versioned shared context.
management.versionDescription: Draft a new version for the selected document and promote it when ready.
management.bindingDescription: Attach document versions to the enterprise, workspace, or enrolled project with optional language and path filters.
management.projectRelationshipLine1: Personal memory works without any enterprise.
management.projectRelationshipLine2: Shared project context starts only after you enroll a repository into the currently selected enterprise.
management.projectRelationshipLine3: Workspace is optional and always belongs to that same enterprise. It is a grouping layer, not a separate owner.
management.projectRelationshipLine4: Scope controls how far a project shares context inside the enterprise. It does not change which enterprise owns it.
management.belongsToWorkspaceValue: Optional subgroup inside the selected enterprise.
management.sharesWithProjectValue: Only this enrolled repository shares context.
management.sharesWithWorkspaceValue: Projects in the same workspace share context together.
management.sharesWithEnterpriseValue: All enrolled projects in the current enterprise can share context.
management.chooseSharingLevelProject: One repository, one shared context boundary. Use this for most teams.
management.chooseSharingLevelWorkspace: Several related repositories inside one workspace share context together.
management.chooseSharingLevelEnterprise: The broadest scope. Use only when all enrolled projects should share the same context pool.
management.scopeProjectDescription: Share context only for this enrolled repository.
management.scopeWorkspaceDescription: Share across projects grouped under the same workspace.
management.scopeEnterpriseDescription: Share at the enterprise level across all enrolled projects.
management.scopeSourceWithoutWorkspace: No workspace selected. This project still belongs to {{enterprise}}.
management.policyExplainLine1: These settings control how this shared project behaves when a provider cannot fully support shared context or when the remote shared state is unavailable.
management.policyExplainLine2: Use the stricter options for team-owned codebases. Use the more permissive options only when you need continuity over strict consistency.
management.allowDegradedHelp: Allow providers that can only inject shared context in a reduced or message-side form. Turn this off if the team requires consistent behavior across providers.
management.allowLocalFallbackHelp: Allow this machine to keep using its local processed context when shared remote context is stale or temporarily unavailable.
management.requireFullSupportHelp: Only allow providers that fully support normalized shared-context injection. This is the strictest setting.
management.requireFullProviderSupportHelp: Only allow providers that fully support normalized shared-context injection. This is the strictest setting.
management.processingSummaryLine1: Raw activity is staged locally, then materialized into processed local context on delayed jobs.
management.processingSummaryLine2: Shared projects can replicate processed context to the remote shared store after local materialization succeeds.
management.processingSummaryLine3: This panel manages enterprise policy and authored knowledge. It does not directly run the materializer.
management.processingCloudSyncNote: This setting is saved in the cloud for the selected server and synced into the daemon when it is connected or restarts.
management.processingServerRequired: Select a server before managing processing settings.
management.processingProviderNote: Choose both the SDK/backend and the model. The daemon will use this pair when it runs local shared-context materialization jobs.
management.processingBackendNote: The backend decides which runtime executes the model. The model alone is not enough.
management.processingUiGap: This setting is server-scoped, not enterprise-global.
management.processingOperationalLine1: If no server-saved value exists, the primary model defaults to "sonnet".
management.processingOperationalLine2: The backup model is optional and defaults to unset.
management.processingOperationalLine3: Different servers can still use different saved processing models. This panel edits the selected server only.
management.memorySummaryLine1: Local personal memory keeps both pending raw events and processed summaries so you can see what is still waiting and what has already been compressed.
management.memorySummaryLine2: When personal cloud sync is enabled, only processed summaries replicate to your user-scoped cloud memory pool for cross-device continuity.
management.memorySummaryLine3: Shared memory stats show enterprise-scoped processed context that other enrolled projects can reuse.
management.personalSyncDescription: Choose whether processed personal memory should replicate to your account-wide cloud memory pool.
management.personalSyncToggle: Enable cloud sync for personal memory
management.personalSyncHelp: Enabled by default so summaries can power cross-device continuity and related-history recall. Turn it off only if you want personal memory to stay local-only.
management.personalSyncDisableConfirm: Turn off personal cloud sync? Cross-device memory, recent summary sync, and related-history recall may be affected until you turn it back on.
management.memoryRecallThresholdDescription: Adjust the minimum composite score required before related history is injected into a message.
management.memoryRecallThresholdHelp: Lower values inject more history. Higher values are stricter. Default: {{defaultValue}}.
management.memoryAdvancedScoringDescription: Adjust how similarity, recency, recall frequency, and project affinity contribute to memory ranking.
management.memoryAdvancedScoringHelp: These controls are for advanced tuning. Values are normalized to sum to 1.0 before scoring.
management.memoryAuthoredDescription: Enterprise-managed documents bound to shared projects. Managed in the Knowledge tab.
management.memoryAuthoredSeeKnowledge: Authored context bindings are managed in the Knowledge tab above. This view shows which bindings apply to your current project scope.
management.memoryQueryDescription: Search local personal memory, cloud personal memory, and enterprise shared memory using the same filters.
management.memoryRecentDescription: Turn-level compressed summaries generated from recent local activity.
management.memoryDurableDescription: Condensed long-lived preferences, constraints, and pinned decisions.
management.memoryProcessedNote: Processed memory uses semantic vector search. Raw pending events stay local and use text filtering only; cloud personal memory and enterprise shared memory store processed summaries, not raw chat transcripts.
management.memoryPendingDescription: These events have not been materialized yet. They remain local raw activity and only support text filtering, not semantic vector search.
management.memoryProcessedDescription: These entries are processed memory summaries ranked with semantic vector search. Local views show processed summaries beside local pending events; cloud and enterprise views contain processed summaries only.
management.memoryProcessedEmptyPending: No processed summaries yet. Only pending raw events are available below.
management.memoryDeleteConfirm: Delete this memory permanently? This cannot be undone.
management.memoryPost11AdminDescription: Manage runtime-visible preferences, skill registry entries, markdown ingest, and observation promotion from the daemon that owns the local memory store.
management.memoryAdminDaemonRequired: Connect to a daemon to manage local preferences, skills, markdown ingest, and observations.
management.memoryPreferencesDescription: Manage @pref entries that are injected into provider context for matching user scopes.
management.memoryPreferenceDeleteConfirm: Delete this preference? It will no longer be injected into future turns.
management.memorySkillsDescription: Inspect the lightweight skill registry used at startup. Full skill bodies are read only when previewed or when the agent asks for a matching skill.
management.memoryProjectDirPlaceholder: Project directory (for project skills / MD ingest)
management.memorySkillDeleteConfirm: Delete this skill file and remove it from the registry?
management.memorySkillsEmpty: No registry entries found. Rebuild after installing or creating skills.
management.memoryMdIngestDescription: Run a bounded manual ingest for trusted project markdown files. Unsupported cross-scope ingest fails closed instead of silently downgrading.
management.memoryObservationsDescription: Inspect typed durable observations and promote scope only through an explicit audited UI action.
management.memoryObservationsEmpty: No observations found for the selected filters.
management.memoryFeatureStatusDescription: User-global online memory feature flags for post-1.1 memory. Changes are stored in your account and applied to every server you own; local daemon/env config is only a fallback.
management.memoryFeatureDisabledNotice: This feature is disabled; management writes are blocked until the feature flag is enabled.

error.observation_mutation_forbidden: You are not authorized to modify this observation.

management.memoryToolsDescription: Manage preferences, skills, markdown ingest, observations, and daemon memory feature status with the selected project identity.
management.mcpSummaryLine1: Managed providers can expose eleven runtime-scoped MCP tools through the daemon-controlled server: memory search/recent summaries/source lookup, observation and preference writes, scoped Send, and Cron scheduling.
management.mcpSummaryLine2: Memory tools return compact hits with refs and projectionId values; list_memory_summaries pulls recent digests, and get_memory_sources expands relevant hits when exact prior instructions, bug details, or source evidence matter.
management.mcpSummaryLine3: Send tools discover sibling sessions and send scoped text, file references, reply requests, or broadcasts through the guarded imcodes send pipeline.
management.mcpSummaryLine4: Cron tools create, list, update, and delete scheduled structured sends for reminders, recurring checks, delegated reviews, and follow-ups.
management.mcpSummaryLine5: This view shows provider readiness, degraded setup reasons, feature gates, and recent redacted tool calls; missing MCP reports stay explicit instead of assuming the tools are healthy.
management.mcpProviderStatusDescription: Eight managed providers are tracked for the eleven-tool stdio MCP MVP.
management.mcpToolGatesDescription: Memory, Send, and Cron tools must pass both their underlying feature gates and the MCP kill-switches.
management.mcpRecentCallsDescription: Only daemon-redacted request and result snippets are shown here.
management.mcpNoDaemon: Connect the local daemon to load MCP status.
management.mcpStatusLoading: Waiting for MCP status from the daemon…
management.mcpStatusTimeout: No MCP status response yet. The backend may not expose this view on the current daemon.
management.mcpStatusError: MCP status could not be loaded.
management.mcpProviderStatusHint: MCP-specific status is reported separately from provider connectivity.
management.mcpRecentCallsEmpty: No redacted MCP calls have been reported yet.

mcpReason.env_forwarding_unverified: Per-session MCP env forwarding is not proven.
mcpReason.feature_disabled: A required feature gate is disabled.
mcpReason.status_not_reported: MCP status has not been reported.

management.memoryProjectPickerDescription: Browse memory across all projects by default. Choose a project only to filter the browse list or to run local file-backed tools.
management.memoryProjectSearchPlaceholder: Search project name, canonical ID, or directory
management.memoryProjectEmpty: No known projects yet. Open a session in the project or use the advanced resolver fallback.
management.memoryProjectNeedsResolve: Needs daemon resolution before local tools can run.
management.memoryProjectCanonicalOnlyNotice: This project can filter memory; actions that read/write local files need a resolved local directory.
management.memoryProjectAdvancedDescription: Manual values are an advanced fallback. Prefer selecting a known project so the daemon can validate the directory-to-ID mapping.
management.memoryProjectLocalToolsDisabled: Local file-backed tools need a selected project with a validated directory and canonical ID. Browsing still works without selecting a project.
management.memorySkillSearchPlaceholder: Search skills by name, layer, path, or description
management.memoryFeatureUnavailableDetail: Connect to the server to load your account-level feature flags and enable management actions.
management.memoryFeatureLoadingDetail: Waiting for the server feature-status response…
management.memoryFeatureNoResponseDetail: The server did not answer the feature-status request. Refresh or reconnect.
management.memoryFeatureErrorDetail: Feature status could not be loaded.
management.memoryFeatureUnknownDetail: The server response did not include this feature flag.
management.memoryFeatureEnabledDetail: This feature is enabled for your account and will apply across your servers.
management.memoryFeatureDisabledHint: Disabled for your account. Use Enable here to persist it online for all your servers; {{env}} remains a daemon bootstrap fallback. {{behavior}}
management.memoryToolProjectNone: Select a project for local tools
management.memoryProjectPickerSplitHelp: Top filter controls memory browsing and defaults to all projects. The local action project is only for tools such as Markdown ingest or skill rebuild/read that need a directory.
management.memoryPersonalBreakdown: Personal total breakdown: {{processed}} local processed · {{pending}} local pending · {{cloud}} cloud.
management.memoryProcessedEmptyWithCloud: No local processed summaries. Personal cloud has {{count}} records available.
management.memoryUnprocessedEmptyWithData: No local pending raw events. Existing processed/cloud records are available in the other tabs.
management.memoryLocalStatusUnavailable: Local daemon is unavailable; local processed and pending counts cannot be loaded.
management.memoryLocalStatusNoResponse: No response from the local daemon; local counts may be stale or unavailable.
management.memoryLocalStatusError: Local daemon returned an error while loading personal memory.
management.memoryToolDisabledNoDaemon: Connect the local daemon before using this management action.
management.memoryToolDisabledFeature: This feature is disabled. Use the Feature flags status tab to enable it globally for your account; {{env}} remains a daemon bootstrap fallback.
management.memoryToolDisabledFeatureUnknown: Feature status is not loaded yet; refresh the management panel first.
management.memoryToolDisabledProjectRequired: Select a resolved project with both canonical ID and local directory before running this local tool.
management.memoryFeatureDependencyBlockedHint: Requested on, but dependencies are still disabled: {{deps}}. Enable the dependencies first. {{behavior}}
management.processingPresetNoneTitle: No preset — use the default provider endpoint
management.processingModelPresetTitle: Model is set by the active preset. Clear the preset to pick another.
management.statSelectServerToSync: Select a server to sync processing config
management.inviteFlowLine1: New invitations create member access only.
management.inviteFlowLine2: Admin role changes happen after join, from the member management section.

memoryFeatureDisabledBehavior.preferences: @pref lines pass through as plain text and are not persisted or stripped.
memoryFeatureDisabledBehavior.mdIngest: No markdown files are read, parsed, or ingested.
memoryFeatureDisabledBehavior.skills: The loader returns an empty set; skill rendering is skipped; admin writes are rejected or disabled.
memoryFeatureDisabledBehavior.skillAutoCreation: No skill-review jobs are claimed or created. Existing skills still load when Skills is enabled.
memoryFeatureDisabledBehavior.observationStore: No new observation rows are written; processed projections remain readable.
memoryFeatureDisabledBehavior.namespaceRegistry: No new namespace records are written outside migration/backfill; legacy projection reads remain available.

management.memoryPromotionHelp: Promotion is a two-step audited action. Choose a target scope, review the exact from/to change on the record, then confirm. Confirming may make the observation available under the target scope authorization rules.
management.memoryPromotionConfirmBody: This will promote the observation from {{from}} to {{to}} and write a promotion audit entry. The original source text is not edited, but future memory selection may use the target scope visibility rules.
management.memoryPromotionNoReason: No reason provided. The audit entry will still record actor, source scope, target scope, and time.
management.memoryObservationDeleteConfirm: Delete this observation and its linked projection when present?
management.memoryManualAddDescription: Save a project-bound personal memory without waiting for automatic compaction.
management.memoryManualAddPlaceholder: Write a durable note, decision, or summary to remember for this project…
management.memoryManualAddProjectRequired: Choose a project in the project selector or browse filter before adding memory.

embedding.status_unknown: Embedding status unknown (older daemon or disconnected)
embedding.status_ready: Embedding ready — semantic search runs locally
embedding.status_fallback: Embedding: local pipeline unavailable, using server fallback
embedding.status_unavailable: Embedding unavailable — semantic search disabled on this daemon
embedding.status_idle: Embedding idle (not yet used this session)

picker.delegate_to_agent: Delegate a task to one agent

delegation.warning_empty_task: Enter a task before delegating to an agent.
delegation.warning_attachments: Delegation does not support attachments yet. Remove attachments and describe the task in text.
delegation.warning_quotes: Delegation does not support quoted chat excerpts yet. Remove quotes and include the needed context in the task.
delegation.warning_file_refs: Delegation does not support @ file references yet. Paste the relevant path or context into the task.
delegation.warning_p2p_tokens: Delegation is separate from Team/P2P controls. Remove @@ tokens or switch back to Team mode.
delegation.warning_control_command: Delegation cannot run session control commands. Remove /stop, /model, /thinking, or /effort and describe the task instead.

error.mixed_delegation_p2p_fields: Delegation cannot be combined with Team/P2P controls.
error.invalid_delegation_target: Choose a valid agent delegation target.
error.delegation_self_target: You cannot delegate a task to the current session.
error.delegation_target_unavailable: That agent is unavailable. Choose another target.
error.delegation_target_forbidden: That agent is outside this project or not allowed.
error.delegation_target_not_reply_capable: That target cannot reply to delegated tasks.
error.delegation_empty_task: Enter a task before delegating to an agent.
error.delegation_unsupported_input: Delegation does not support this input yet.
error.delegation_dispatch_failed: Delegation failed before the task was sent.

codex_credits.title: Codex reset credits
codex_credits.confirm: Consume 1 credit? This resets your Codex rate limits.
codex_credits.outcome_nothing_to_reset: Not currently rate-limited — no credit used.

controlled_nodes.title: Controlled Nodes
controlled_nodes.no_executables: No installer downloads are listed for this server.
controlled_nodes.availability_error: Could not load installer availability. Check your connection and try again.
controlled_nodes.download_popup_blocked: Your browser blocked the download window. Allow pop-ups for this site and try again.
controlled_nodes.mint_executable_not_built: This installer is not available on the server yet.
controlled_nodes.mint_canonical_server_url_required: The server URL is not configured for controlled-node downloads. Ask your administrator to set a canonical public URL.
controlled_nodes.ticket_expired: This download link has expired. Start a new download.
controlled_nodes.usage_step1: Download the executable for the target machine's OS.
controlled_nodes.usage_step2: Run it once on that machine with the required privileges (see OS notes below).
controlled_nodes.usage_step3: It auto-enrolls, installs boot autostart, and appears below when online.
controlled_nodes.usage_step4: Keep or copy the installer to enroll other machines. The download link expires; the downloaded package does not.
controlled_nodes.usage_win_run: Run as Administrator. If SmartScreen appears, choose More info → Run anyway.
controlled_nodes.usage_mac_run: On first launch, bypass Gatekeeper: right-click the app → Open, or run: xattr -cr <path> then open normally.
controlled_nodes.usage_linux_run: Make it executable (chmod +x <file>) and run once as root (sudo).
controlled_nodes.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
controlled_nodes.rename_invalid: Enter a name from 1 to 120 characters without control characters.
controlled_nodes.revoke_confirm: Revoke this machine? It can no longer be controlled and must be re-enrolled.

peerAuditQuick.tooltip: Delegate a quick review to another agent
peerAuditQuick.delegationDescription: Choose a mode, then click an agent to delegate immediately. This session will summarize its recent work and wait for the reply.
peerAuditQuick.sendFailed: The delegation was not accepted. Check the connection and try again.
peerAuditQuick.customPlaceholder: What should the selected agent do?
peerAuditQuick.consentBody: The audit summary will be sent to {{auditor}}, which runs on a different model provider. Continue?
peerAuditQuick.selectionWillPersist: This auditor will also be remembered for future automatic audits of this session.
peerAuditQuick.noCandidate: No other agent is available in this session group.

chooserReason.missing_target: No remembered auditor is set. Pick one to start.
chooserReason.self_target: The remembered auditor is this session. Pick a different one.
chooserReason.stale_target: The remembered auditor is no longer eligible. Pick one to continue.
chooserReason.same_model_remembered: The remembered auditor uses the same model. Pick a different model or confirm explicitly.
chooserReason.unknown_model_remembered: The remembered auditor's model is unknown. Pick one to continue.
chooserReason.no_candidate: No eligible auditor is available right now.
chooserReason.model_changed_since_click: The audited session's model changed since you opened this. Pick an auditor.
